title: Anonymous Document Sanitizer
description: Strip metadata, EXIF profiles, and tracking tags from your JPEG and PNG files. Fully processed in transient memory. Never stored, never logged.
dragText: Drag and drop your image here, or
subtext: Supports JPEG, JPG, and PNG images up to 10MB
errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please select a JPEG, JPG, or PNG image.
errorTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size allowed is 10MB.

terms.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.text: By accessing and utilizing this tool, you explicitly agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, cease operation immediately.

terms.title: Purpose of Use
terms.text: This tool is built exclusively for personal data optimization, data minimization, and individual privacy preservation.

terms.title: Illicit Operations
terms.text: You are strictly prohibited from using this tool to alter digital information involved in ongoing active litigation, legal subpoenas, or judicial proceedings (Spoliation of Evidence).

terms.title: Copyright Management
terms.text: You agree not to utilize this tool to strip Copyright Management Information (CMI) as defined under digital copyright frameworks for the purposes of intellectual property theft or unauthorized commercial exploitation.

terms.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.text: This service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. The developer assumes zero liability for user non-compliance, structural misuse, or data modifications.

privacy.title: Zero Data Retention
privacy.text: We do not collect, process, track, or retain any data submitted to this application.

privacy.title: In-Memory Processing
privacy.text: Your files are handled strictly within volatile PHP runtime memory during the lifetime of the network request. Files are deleted automatically upon execution completion.

privacy.title: No Identifiers
privacy.text: This site uses no tracking scripts, cookies, analytics, or external third-party dependencies. Your operations remain fully confidential.
